source.section: 2.1 - Air-to-Air Modes > 2.1.7 - ACM (Air Combat Maneuvering) Modes > 2.1.7.5 - GACQ (Gun Acquisition)

steps.action: Making sure HMD (Helmet-Mounted Display) is OFF
Pressing the Weapon Control Switch aft to select Air-to-Air Gun and enter GACQ ACM mode.
Radar will automatically attempt to lock on the nearest target To exit GACQ mode: Use Weapon Select Switch to select another weapon, or Toggle the A/A Master Mode OFF and ON.
